name: Disputify
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[Image: User-added image]"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This add-on was built by "}, {"text": "Disputify", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}, {"text": "\n"}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.disputify.com/", "children": [{"text": "Visit add-on website"}]}, {"text": "\n"}, {"text": "For support with this add-on "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://disputify.atlassian.net/servicedesk/customer/portal/2/group/3/create/12", "children": [{"text": "contact Disputify"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Overview"}], "data-id": "overview"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Disputify sits invisibly on your Neto webstore checkout to track your Stripe transactions in real-time. Disputify leverages a network of data points to calculate the probability of any given transaction resulting in a fraudulent chargeback."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Dispute scores are added to each of your transactions allowing you to view your customers fraud history before dispatching orders, essentially creating a virtual \u201cblocklist\u201d of high risk customers."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Install and Set up the Disputify Add-on"}], "data-id": "install-and-set-up-the-disputify-add-on"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To set up the Disputify add-on in your Neto webstore:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel click on the "}, {"text": "Addons", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Find the Disputify add-on and click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Disputify add-on will be installed in your control panel."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the pop-up window, click the "}, {"text": "Configure Disputify", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Follow the steps on the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://disputify.atlassian.net/servicedesk/customer/portal/2/article/524291", "children": [{"text": "Disputify help site"}]}, {"text": " to configure your Disputify connection."}]}]}]}]
